creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
Using options: 
     BLACKLISTD=on: FreeBSD blacklistd(8) support
     BSM=on: OpenBSM Auditing
A "make -C /usr/ports/openssh-portable clean build" results in:

===>  Patching for openssh-portable-9.3.p2_1,1
===>  Applying extra patch /big/ports/security/openssh-portable/files/extra-patch-blacklistd
1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to sshd_config.5.rej

I removed the section for sshd_config.5 in extra-patch-blacklistd and the build/install/use completed successfully.
